title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> They cannot participate in any strate
content:
✔ They cannot participate in any strategic play, sabotage, or power-ups.
✔ Instead, if they stay committed, they receive a final “Ascetic Reward” at the end.

📜 Archetype Name: “The Wandering Ascetic” (The Monk, The Exile, The Self-Denier)
✔ Inspired by figures like Jesus in the desert, Siddhartha Gautama before enlightenment, and literary monks/hermits.
✔ Requires a vow of abstinence from XP, items, and special interactions.
✔ They must declare their path in the first three weeks—no switching once committed.

📜 Ascetic Reward (If Completed)
✔ If a student successfully abstains from all XP-based elements for the full semester, they receive:
• A one-time “Trial of Purity” bonus (Their lowest grade is dropped).
• A unique title: “The Untouched Scholar” (Notably rare and difficult to achieve).
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 210 (chunk 210/555)
